entries: **Codex quota stuck on stale values**: `load_rate_limits()` returned as soon as SQLite (`logs_2.sqlite`) had any data, never comparing the newer `rate_limits` in `~/.codex/sessions/*.jsonl`, so the menu bar stayed pinned to the previous day's quota. It now reads both SQLite and JSONL and picks the newest valid entry by `updated_at`, keeping the prior SQLite-preferred behavior when timestamps are equal.
